existing_contact_assessment.name: ARLEEN PRESTON
existing_contact_assessment.title: Plan Administrator (Form 5500)
existing_contact_assessment.reasoning: Searches for 'Arleen Preston Verizon' did not yield any current information linking her to investment decision-making roles. Her title 'Plan Administrator (Form 5500)' typically indicates a role in benefits administration, HR, or plan compliance, rather than direct investment management.

232259884.notes: The general investor relations phone number (212) 395-1525 was found in a 2008 SEC filing. While dated, it is the most specific IR phone number found from an official source. Other phone numbers found were for shareowner services (Computershare) or from a third-party real estate site for Verizon Wireless, which are not suitable for institutional investor relations for Verizon Communications Inc. No direct email addresses were found for any of the named contacts.

contacts.name: Craig Jalbert
contacts.title: Principal at Verdolino & Lowey PC, Lead for Wind-Down Process
contacts.contact_notes: Email provided as the contact for all inquiries after Lyndra Therapeutics ceased operations.

existing_contact_assessment.name: CRAIG JALBERT
existing_contact_assessment.title: Plan Administrator (Form 5500)
existing_contact_assessment.reasoning: Craig Jalbert's role as 'Plan Administrator' on Form 5500 typically relates to employee benefit plans, not investment decision-making for the firm's capital. Furthermore, current information indicates he is a principal at an accounting firm (Verdolino & Lowey PC) and has been brought in to lead the wind-down process for Lyndra Therapeutics, which ceased operations as of March 26, 2025. His current function is administrative and related to the company's closure, not active investment management or allocation for a going concern.

472817157.notes: Lyndra Therapeutics, Inc. ceased operations as of March 26, 2025. All inquiries should be directed to Craig Jalbert. Therefore, there are no active investment decision-makers, allocators, or traditional investor relations contacts at the firm in an ongoing capacity. The contact provided is for inquiries related to the company's wind-down.
